data.title: "Big Brother Maji" has almost given back all of its recent gains, with the current floating profit being only about $1 million.
data.description: According to MLM monitoring, after making a $44 million profit on September 19th, "Big Brother Maji" Huang Licheng has now lost nearly all of his account gains, leaving him with a current profit of just $1 million. He suffered a $42 million loss in 20 days, but still holds nearly $150 million in long positions, with an overall leverage of 14.7x.

data.title: Canary Submits Sixth Amendment to Solana Spot ETF, with a Fee Rate of 0.5%
data.description: According to market news, Canary has submitted its sixth revised application for the Solana spot ETF, which will have a 0.5% fee and no staking reward reduction. In comparison, Bitwise's Solana ETF charges a 0.20% fee but retains a 6% staking reward.

data.title: “Big Brother Maji”’s ETH long position is only $100 away from the liquidation price
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, the liquidation price for "Maji Da Ge"'s ETH long position is $3,992, just $100 away from the current price. He just closed his long HYPE position and added margin to his ETH long position, otherwise the liquidation price would be even closer.

data.description: U.S. short-term interest rate futures rose as traders increased their bets on a Federal Reserve rate cut. In addition, the S&P 500 fell more than 1%, its biggest drop since September 2.

data.title: MetaMask plans to launch multi-chain accounts by the end of October
data.description: MetaMask announced on the X platform that it will launch multi-chain accounts at the end of October. This will allow users to group and manage EVM and non-EVM addresses, and enable transactions and tracking of account assets between the two networks. All EVM accounts on MetaMask will retain their names and addresses. MetaMask's multi-chain accounts will reportedly support other networks, including Bitcoin, Tron, and Monad.
